{{Quote|Round them up boys! Looks like we'll have good hunting tonight. Speeder bikes One and Two, circle around them. Bring them in tight.|Lt. Aagon to his group|<ref name="JKaudio">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Aagon''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] [[Vengeance Battle Group]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="JK">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref>

==Biography==
Aagon was assigned to [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] during his [[Search for the Valley of the Jedi|quest for the Valley of the Jedi]]. After their arrival to [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] in [[5 ABY/Legends|5 ABY]], Aagon was part of his [[Vengeance Battle Group]].

Aagon was regularly leader of a [[squad/Legends|squad]], but he had the custom of remedying the boring duty and lifting the morale of his men by going to hunting against the [[Bouncer]]s, the [[sentience/Legends|sentient]] native creatures of the planet; even if that meant abandoning their authorized area. His men kept some of their dead preys and kept them as trophies above their bunks in their quarters,<ref name="JK" /> and as for Aagon, he had skinned a dozen of them and decorated his corridor.<ref name="JKaudio" /> Their companions didn't know where they came from.<ref name="JK" /> 

One fateful night he led [[Patrol 341]] which included [[skimmer/Legends|skimmer]] [[Zeta 19]] with [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Forley]] as [[pilot/Legends|helmsman]] and [[Leeno]] as [[gunner/Legends|gunner]]. They were escorted by two [[speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]]. They were ordered to patrol an area of ravines and gullies, but as usual he moved his unit ten [[kilometer/Legends|klicks]] north, in a rocky maze where more [[bouncer]]s could be found.<ref name="JK" /> 

Indeed, reaching there they found a group of natives bouncing in the air. The bikes's fire broke a rock pile and then split; the group of bouncers felt doomed and turned inward expecting inevitable the skimmer to slaughter them.<ref name="JK" /> He thought the speeders took too long and Speeder 1 replied that they were rounding up those who got away; as he was over [[comlink/Legends|comlink]], he heard blaster shots.<ref name="JKaudio" /> [[Jan Ors]] with a group of outlaw colonists were observing them from the rocks, and decided to save the [[alien/Legends|aliens]].<ref name="JK" /> 

He landed the skimmer and the troops hid behind some rocks; he ordered Forley to pin down the Rebels so that they'd attack from behind, and with six troopers he pressed forward.<ref name="JK" /> He had to explain to the [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]], whom he didn't consider very bright, that they have to find the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who opened fire, and upon the suggestion to call for backup, Aagon reminded him that they were outside their designated zone and had to rely only on the skimmer.<ref name="JKaudio" /> From the distance he saw some rocks exploding and some [[flare/Legends|flare]]. He didn't know that the rebels also rounded them and silently slew the hindmost troopers.<ref name="JK" /> 

The Sergeant theorized that it was a hit and fade mission but Aagon believed that the Rebels were just hiding very well.<ref name="JKaudio" /> He pulled himself up and drew his [[blaster/Legends|blaster]] but soreone behind touched and demanded to drop the gun. Nonetheless Aagon attempted to turn and kill [[Kyle Katarn|the man]]; momentarily he was killed by [[Qu Rahn's lightsaber|his lightsaber]].<ref name="JK" />

After the skirmish, the Rebels gathered all the bodies of the Imperials and carefully buried them, and collected all equipment that could potentially point o their involvement in the patrol's disappearance. Around two days after their expected return, searches were conducted in their designated area which returned nothing. [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Yun]] was sent for ground inspection, who having seen the dead creatures hanged as trophies in his men's quarters, he determined the area of their disappearance.<ref name="JK" />

==Personality and traits==
A resourceful officer, he valued fun and sport and kept his soldiers occupied on patrol by taking them to hunt the native [[Bouncer]]s even if that meant outside of their patrol zone one night.<ref name="JK" />

While engaging the Rebels in the desert he decided not to call for reinforcement; not only because he was outside their designatede area, but also so as he took all the credit for the victory.<ref name="JK" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|audio adaptation]] of ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'', he was voiced by [[Christopher Bloch]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''
